description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy design. The front features a prominent overhang above a large bay window and a main entry door, both set into a recessed area with a paved driveway and a small patch of green lawn. The house is surrounded by a white fence enclosing a yard with both grass and paved surfaces, providing a clear boundary from the street. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large panes on the front and smaller, more utilitarian windows on the sides and rear. The rear of the house is simpler, with a large expanse of brick and fewer windows, and the side elevations show the continuation of the fence and yard. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large front bay window, and a fenced yard featuring both grass and paved areas. The design is boxy and contemporary, with symmetrical window placement and a prominent entryway overhang.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large bay window, overhang, driveway, and fenced yard with grass.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, continuation of the white fence, and a mix of grass and paved surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simpler brick facade, fewer windows, and a clear view of the paved and grassy yard areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a smaller window, the full length of the fence, and the paved driveway area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large bay window at front
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a large overhang, bay window, and paved entry area
